title: betonica alopecuros subsp. jacquinii
intro: Betonica alopecuros subsp. jacquinii, also known as Stachys officinalis subsp. alopecuros, is a subspecies of the Betonica alopecuros plant, commonly referred to as the wood betony. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems, and are traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Betonica alopecuros subsp. jacquinii include reducing inflammation, improving mental clarity, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief and promoting a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Betonica alopecuros subsp. jacquinii typically involve drying the leaves and stems, then infusing them in hot water to make a tea, or using the dried plant in tincture or capsule form.
